response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 15-year experience minimum with 18+ years in software engineering and holds a strong MIT degree in CS. Recent engagement with AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq is promising. However, the resume lacks demonstrated deep AI/ML product expertise, an advanced degree in AI (preferred), and clear evidence of director-level strategic impact required for this principal engineer role. Current AI work is too recent to fully assess expertise depth.
strengths: Exceeds seniority baseline with 18+ years across infrastructure, cloud, and full-stack engineering
Current role explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, showing recent AI engagement
Strong technical foundation in cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and infrastructure (CI/CD, DevOps) with entrepreneurial experience
concerns: Limited evidence of deep AI/ML product expertise or LLM/generative AI work beyond recent months
No advanced degree in AI-related field despite preference for Master's/PhD; AI knowledge appears recent rather than foundational
Staff-level experience, but unclear evidence of director-level strategic leadership, customer advisory work, or influencing cloud/AI platform direction
